Full job description
Identify, develop and win new business opportunities within the Auto, Industrial, Beverage, Rail and Utilities sectors that fit with our core competencies and capabilities, delivering a New Business pipeline and growth for the business. Opportunities normally in the range of £1.5m to £10m sales, £150k to £1m EBITDA.

Main Duties & Responsibilities:

Engagement plan: Create and maintain a network of prospects and contacts to enhance awareness and reputation of TVS and influence future opportunities.
Marketing platform management
Engagement planning
Strategic development and Cold calling
Identify opportunities, either through advertised Tender process or through the relationship management above to create a healthy New Business pipeline.
Lead and manage the bid qualification and submission process, utilising support from within the functional business teams, to deliver successful win conversion rates. Ensure TVS profit and cash expectations are achievable and follow the processes.
Remain abreast of industry developments and market trends within the desired sectors and proactively communicate with the TVS organisation.
Maintain the TVS’ CRM system in a timely basis to reflect all networking, prospect and bid opportunities.
Launch the project within TVS through our Business Winning process and work in liaison with the appointed Project Manager to bring the opportunity to a successful conclusion.
Knowledge, Skills, Qualifications and Experience:

Determined, empathetic and persuasive person with strong influencing and interpersonal skills
High degree of commercial and analytical acumen
Goal driven and focused
Project management, negotiation and presentation skills to senior level essential
Demonstrate a proactive approach and the ability to organise to achieve results, quickly absorbing an interpreting new/complex information
An in-depth knowledge of the market and supply chain requirements
Continuous improvement ethos
In return for your hard work, we offer excellent career progression opportunities and a professional environment where you can acquire, use, and continue developing your skills.

Your package will include:

Competitive Salary
Pension scheme with up to 6% employer matched contributions
Life assurance
25 days holiday + 8 statutory bank holidays
Holiday buy-back scheme (5 additional days available)
Salary sacrifice car scheme - A cost-effective way to purchase a new car via salary sacrifice (subject to meeting minimum earnings eligibility criteria).
Established hybrid working structure
Enhanced maternity and paternity leave
Employee Assistance Programme supporting wellness with immediate access for you and your family to:

1. Virtual GP consultations and second opinions

2. Mental health support and counselling

3. Online physiotherapy

4. Access to CONNECTPlus long-term health condition support

5. Wellbeing and healthy living support

Cycle to work scheme
Professional Membership and Study Sponsorship
Quarterly employee recognition awards
Employee referral scheme with financial reward
Benefits hub with employee retail discounts
Discounted eye test vouchers
At TVS SCS we encourage and support our employees to realise their potential. They are empowered to take initiative and achieve high impact results that really make a difference to our business and our customers.

If you require any adjustments to allow you take a full and active part in the selection process, please notify us as part of your application. Please note TVS Supply Chain Solutions is an Equal Opportunities Employer.

TVS have signed the Armed Forces covenant and are a forces friendly employer.

Job Type: Full-time

Benefits:

Canteen
Company car
Company pension
Discounted or free food
Free parking
On-site parking
Work from home
Work Location: On the road
shortCompanyReason: Named employer is TVS Supply Chain Solutions, a supply chain business.
shortRoleReason: Role is explicitly titled Business Development Manager.
companySummary: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a supply chain solutions company operating in the UK and presenting itself as an equal opportunities, forces-friendly employer.
roleSummary: The role focuses on winning new business across selected sectors, building a pipeline, managing bids, and supporting project launch through TVS’s business winning process.
headlineAttraction: Opportunity to win £1.5m to £10m sales deals across key sectors in a hybrid UK role.
rolePurpose: To identify, develop and win new business opportunities that fit TVS Supply Chain Solutions’ capabilities and drive growth.
travelRequired: Not stated; role location marked on the road.
advertSummary: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is hiring a Business Development Manager in the UK on a full-time hybrid basis. The role targets new business growth in Auto, Industrial, Beverage, Rail and Utilities sectors, with responsibility for prospecting, bid management, CRM upkeep and stakeholder coordination.
personalisedIntro: I’m looking at this role because it sits at the point where commercial judgement, disciplined process and stakeholder management all matter. My background is in taking complex operations, tightening control and improving outcomes in environments where delivery has to stand up to scrutiny. That is the sort of work I’d bring to TVS Supply Chain Solutions.
whyThisRole: This role fits the kind of work I do best: building momentum, qualifying opportunities carefully, and keeping the commercial process tight from first contact through to handover. I’m comfortable working with complex information, senior stakeholders and structured processes, and I’d expect to add value where the role needs pace, judgement and follow-through.
coreResponsibilities: Create and maintain a network of prospects and contacts
Use strategic development and cold calling to generate opportunities
Identify opportunities through tenders and relationship management
Use support from functional business teams
Ensure profit and cash expectations are achievable
Track industry developments and market trends
Launch projects through the business winning process and work with the appointed Project Manager
essentialRequirements: Ability to organise and achieve results
Ability to absorb and interpret complex information quickly
In-depth knowledge of the market and supply chain requirements
possibleHeadlineFacts: Opportunities typically range from £1.5m to £10m sales
Pension with up to 6% employer match

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: Commercial operator who turns complex pipelines into measurable wins.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m looking at this role because it sits at the point where commercial judgement, disciplined process and stakeholder management all matter. My background is in taking complex operations, tightening control and improving outcomes in environments where delivery has to stand up to scrutiny. That is the sort of work I’d bring to TVS Supply Chain Solutions.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: TVS Supply Chain Solutions stands out to me because it is clear about the kind of environment it offers: hybrid working, a professional setting, and a culture that expects people to take initiative and make a visible difference. I also notice the equal opportunities and forces-friendly positioning, which tells me TVS wants people to feel they can contribute properly and be supported while doing it.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role fits the kind of work I do best: building momentum, qualifying opportunities carefully, and keeping the commercial process tight from first contact through to handover. I’m comfortable working with complex information, senior stakeholders and structured processes, and I’d expect to add value where the role needs pace, judgement and follow-through.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Commercial acumen and protecting profit/cash expectations
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve already worked in a role where tighter control, better reporting and cash improvement mattered. That gives me a practical base for thinking about margin, working capital and whether an opportunity is worth pursuing.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the strongest proof point for commercial discipline and financial judgement.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve helped improve profit, release working capital and strengthen cash performance through tighter control.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: New business growth mindset and operational understanding of supply chain requirements
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve worked in a specialist manufacturing environment during a growth phase, where delivery discipline and resilience mattered every day. That makes me comfortable around operational realities, customer expectations and the pressure that comes with growth.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as supporting evidence for sector credibility and practical understanding of operational delivery.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve led operations through growth, with better margin, more orders won and stronger resilience.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Project management, stakeholder coordination and handling complex information
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This example shows I can manage complex work, keep standards high and support a team through critical delivery periods. That is relevant to bid coordination, internal alignment and moving opportunities through a structured process.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as supporting evidence for bid coordination, internal collaboration and process control.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve managed complex, business-critical work while keeping service standards and team delivery on track.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: My reading of this role is that it needs someone who can create commercial momentum, qualify opportunities properly and keep the process disciplined all the way through to bid and launch. It also needs someone who can work across functions, stay close to the market and handle senior conversations with confidence.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Build and maintain a healthy new business pipeline
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in a growth environment where orders won increased and operational discipline had to keep pace with demand.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me a practical feel for what growth needs behind the scenes, not just the front-end conversation.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported profit improvement, reduced debtor balances and helped increase cash at bank in a regulated environment.
experienceMappings.relevance: That matters here because the role is not just about winning work, but winning the right work.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Lead bid qualification and submission with internal support
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve coordinated complex, time-sensitive work with a team and kept delivery standards in place under pressure.
experienceMappings.relevance: That maps well to managing bid activity across functions and keeping the process moving.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in structured environments where clear communication, prioritisation and stakeholder coordination were essential.
experienceMappings.relevance: This role needs someone who can represent opportunities clearly and credibly at senior level.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Absorb complex information quickly and organise to achieve results
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve built reporting across operational and financial measures, including reconciliations and performance tracking.
experienceMappings.relevance: That shows I’m comfortable turning detail into something usable for decision-making.

focusAreasToBring.title: Commercial judgement
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on qualifying opportunities early, keeping an eye on margin, cash and fit so time is spent on the right work.

focusAreasToBring.title: Bid discipline
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would keep bid activity organised, clear and accountable, with good internal coordination and no loose ends.

focusAreasToBring.title: Market awareness
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would stay close to sector movement and use that to shape prospecting, conversations and timing.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring a mix of commercial control, operational discipline and stakeholder management that fits the shape of this role. My background is not in supply chain sales specifically, but I have worked in complex, performance-led environments where results depended on good judgement, clear process and follow-through. That is why I think I can add value quickly here.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would expect to spend the first 6-12 months building a disciplined pipeline, improving the quality of opportunity qualification and keeping CRM and bid activity accurate and current. I’d also expect to work closely with internal teams so opportunities are progressed cleanly and the handover into launch is well controlled.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments where people are trusted to take ownership and where performance matters. The way TVS describes the role suggests a culture that values initiative, accountability and steady improvement, which suits how I work.

first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get close to the current opportunity base, the CRM discipline, the bid flow and the internal handover points so I understand where value is won or lost.
I would focus on the quality of opportunities entering the pipeline, how they are qualified, and how engagement plans are being used to move prospects forward.
I would look for practical ways to tighten bid coordination, improve internal visibility and make sure opportunities are being progressed with clear commercial judgement.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would bring TVS Supply Chain Solutions a practical, commercially minded approach to winning work and keeping the process under control.
closingProofPoints: I’ve helped improve profit, cash and debtor performance.
I’ve led operations through growth and improved delivery discipline.
I’ve managed complex, time-sensitive work with clear reporting and coordination.
contentNotes: I have kept the content selective because the evidence bank is strongest on operations, financial control and complex delivery rather than direct supply chain sales.
I have not claimed direct new business or bid-winning history because that is not supported by the evidence provided.
Company highlights are limited to facts clearly stated in the advert.
